hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -E '/clients/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' | { read -r f; if [ -z "$f" ]; then exit 0; fi; cd clients && pnpm exec prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -qE '/clients/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' && { cd clients && pnpm typecheck; } 2>/dev/null || true
